calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Leo J. Murphy, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CIT SMALL BUSINESS LENDING CORPORATION.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MEGAPIX IAMGING LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declaration of Mary Adragna and attorney Leo J. Murphy submitted and filed in support of Default Judgment are admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $68,869.26
Pre-Judgment Interest: $17,049.19
Attorney's Fees: $19,895.50
Costs: $674.00
Other: Late Fees $4,747.69
Total Judgment in the amount of $111,235.64
Judgment signed in open court.
